title: VAMPS: Visual-Assisted Mathematical Problem Solving Benchmark
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: VAMPS introduces a new benchmark for evaluating AI models on visually-assisted mathematical problem solving, integrating both visual understanding and mathematical reasoning. The dataset likely includes problems where diagrams or images provide essential context, aiming to push forward multi-modal mathematical reasoning capabilities. This benchmark could become a standard for comparing vision-language models in solving math problems with visual aids.
